name: Cross-reference dependencies against vulnerability advisories
prompt: Read package.json and advisory_data.json. The advisory_data.json contains known vulnerability advisories for npm packages. Cross-reference the dependencies in package.json against the advisories to find vulnerable packages. For each vulnerable dependency, determine: severity, vulnerable version range, whether a patched version exists. Write audit_report.json with: vulnerable (array of {package, installed_version, severity, advisory_id, patched_version or null}), safe (array of package names with no known vulns), risk_summary ({critical, high, medium, low, total_vulnerable, total_safe}).

criteria.description: audit_report.json is created with valid JSON
Severity levels correctly assigned per advisory
criteria.testPattern: severity correct|critical lodash|high express|medium axios|low minimist

criteria.description: Patched version recorded for each vulnerability
